settings.heading: Payment Policy
settings.body:
We accept a variety of secure payment methods to make your purchase easy and safe.

Accepted Payments

Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Shop Pay, and PayPal.

Currency

All prices are listed in Canadian Dollars (CAD) unless otherwise noted. Currency conversion is handled by your payment provider.

Security

All transactions are encrypted with SSL and processed through Shopify Payments. We never store your credit card information.

Pre-Orders & Deposits

Some items may be available for pre-order. Full payment is collected at checkout. If a pre-order is cancelled, a full refund is issued automatically.

Price Matching

We monitor market prices and strive to offer fair, competitive pricing. If you find a lower price from a verified Canadian retailer, contact us and we'll do our best to match it.
